ques: Find a small breed in the Toy group that is good for apartment living, then open its breed profile.
Use the breed selector for an apartment owner who wants moderate energy and low grooming, then report one recommended breed.
Compare the Golden Retriever and Border Collie and determine which has the higher energy rating.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com with password TestPass123! and list one breed already saved in the profile.
Search for agility and open the event or advice result most related to agility training.
Filter events to Training and find the city and state for the Canine Good Citizen Test.
Open the article about questions to ask a responsible breeder and identify its category.
Find a Working group breed with a calm or patient temperament and open its profile.
Register a dog named Scout for the Puppy Training Webinar using the default benchmark account.
Update Alice Johnson's owner profile activity level to Low and confirm the profile page shows the change.
